caption: Lathe II students working on their final project for the class - a crankshaft! They have learned so much over their time in this program.  #machining #machinist #trade #machinistlife #instamachinist
Mill I student using a radius cutter. #whysoserious #manualmachinist #machinist
Mill I students on the lathe today. Kinda funny.  #machinist #instamachinist #tradeschool @lanier_tech
Mill I student making a C Clamp!  #machinist #machining #machineshop #tradeschool #instamachinist

Mill I students learning how to plot points for their c clamp projects. It’s a very useful skill and also good foundation for their upcoming CNC Fundamentals class. #machining #machinist #tradeschool @johngibs2002 @sam.romo16 @lanier_tech
Mill I student @johngibs2002 just finished his 1-2-3 blocks!  Let’s goooo!!! #instamachinist #machinist #machining @lanier_tech
Lathe II student Ethan Burt making some long chips. #instamachinist #chipoftheweek #igchipoftheweek #machinist #machining #tradeschool @lanier_tech
Just @johngibs2002 drilling holes in his 1-2-3 block for Mill I… @lanier_tech #machinist #machining #tradeschool #instamachinist
What is a machinist’s favorite Halloween costume?  #machinist #machining #halloweencostume #machineshop
Mill I student Trygve Myers countersinking like a champ!!! #machinist #manualmilling #machinistlife
Students learning about sine plates today. #manualmachinist
Brendan making chips… #instamachinist #machinist @lanier_tech
We made some upgrades to our new LaBlonde lathes including a rack for a drill chuck and live center. Thanks to @industrialdepot for the hardware!  #machineshop #shopupgrade

Instructor Tommy Morris taking the Intro class through lathe orientation. These students are taking their first steps into the exciting world of manual turning!  #machinist #machineshop #machining #manualmachining @lanier_tech

We took delivery of 3 brand new lathes for the shop @lanier_tech. This required a re-working of the shop layout. All the lathes had to be forklifted out and then put back in.  So naturally, we setup 4 cameras to record the process - including a GoPro 360 camera. #rigger #machineshop #techschool #technicalcollege #tradeschool
The program has three new LeBlond lathes. The students are getting experiencing leveling all the lathes today. Tedious work but good practice in precision.  #machining #machinist
Congrats to @lanier_tech student @jeremiahdaws for bringing home the SILVER medal at this year’s national @skillsusa competition in the category CNC Turning Specialist. #skillsusa #machinist
Heat treat students pulling their 1-2-3 blocks out of the oven. Air cooling. That glow is so pretty!  #machinist #machining
Summer 2022 Heat Treat and Grinding students having fun quenching their projects in oil. @lanier_tech #machining #machinist #heattreat
Photo by LanierTech Precision Machining in Lanier Technical College.
Photo by LanierTech Precision Machining in Lanier Technical College.
Photo by LanierTech Precision Machining on April 28, 2022.

Congrats to our students who took Gold in CNC Turning, Silver in CNC Milling, and Silver in CNC Technician at the Skills GA competition!  Great work! And kudos to Instructor/Sensei Tommy Morris!  @lanier_tech @skillsusagaps #cncmachining #cncmachinist #skillsusa #skillsusageorgia
Good luck to three of our students competing today at the Georgia SkillsUSA contest. @laniertechprecisionmachining  #machining #cncmachining #skillsusa
Here’s a Lathe I student turning a component of his next project - a hammer. #manualmachinist #machining

Instructor Tommy Morris teaching CNC Fundamentals students the basics - today focusing on lathe GCode, points, tool nose radius...
#cncmachining #machining #cnclathe #tradeschool @lanier_tech
CNC Fundamentals class learning how to indicate a vise in the Haas CNC mills.  Putting the FUN in fun-damentals!  #machining #machinist @lanier_tech
Here’s one of our students making a crankshaft. It’s the final project for Lathe II. So satisfying to watch. #satisfying
Big day in the shop!  Intro Students learning how to tram a mill head. These are necessary first steps in their machining journey. #machining #machinist #instamachinist @lanier_tech
Intro to Machine Tool students working on their drill point gauges.  Learning the basics. Filing. Drilling. Tapping. You gotta walk before you run!  @lanier_tech #machinist #machining #tradeschool

We upgraded our shop tables with some shelving - they’re both useful and help to make the tables rock solid. The 2x8s are secured with carriage bolts that were supplied by our friends @industrialdepot. Any time we need specific hardware, we know we can count on them. #machineshop

‘Twas the weeks before Christmas and all through the shop, not a lathe chuck was spinning… 

Machine tool lab is empty and quiet without the students here to run the machines. #machineshop #laniertech @lanier_tech #machining #machinist #instamachinist
Photo by LanierTech Precision Machining in Lanier Technical College.

Here’s a project from our Lathe II class @lanier_tech - an eccentric body and cap. Great project for introducing the concept of offset turning. (Repost from student @jeremiahdaws) #machining #machinist #manuallathe #instamachinist #instamachining
Student offset turning a crankshaft this morning.  #machining #machinist #machineshop @lanier_tech
Thanks again to Industrial Depot.  The welding program @lanier_tech has a stop for their shear.  #industrialdepot @industrialdepot
Photo by LanierTech Precision Machining in Lanier Technical College.

The CNC Lathe class is in the books.  Some of the best looking Machinist Jacks to date were made by this class.  Could not have done it without the help of Industrial Depot.  All new bolts for tool holders and chucks!

When you have problems finding the gear, just get rid of the gear!
Hard Turning !!

A lot of learning in the first couple of days for Part B semester.  Tool retract height was almost high enough.
CNC Class made water cups for new grinders.  Thanks to Industrial Depot we did not have to hunt for fasteners. @industrialdepot
Got some more toys in the shop.  Thanks to Industrial Depot for making sure we had the fasteners to get these grinders running.  #industrialdepot
